_note: Portion with both NODIS and EXDIS fires both E037 (mutual exclusion, Error on the first NonIcDissem at byte 8 = ND) and E041 (NODIS supersedes EXDIS in the portion, Warn on EXDIS at byte 11). E041 has no auto-fix — the parser does not emit within-category `/` as a Separator token, so the rule cannot safely reconstruct FixProposal.original. User removes EXDIS manually.
